# handlers

```go
import "gesitr/internal/user/workout/handlers"
```

Package handlers implements the HTTP handlers for user workout management.

### Overview

A workout is a user\-owned template that organizes exercises into sections. The hierarchy is: Workout → Sections → Section Items. Each section item has a type discriminator: "exercise" items reference an exercise scheme, while "exercise\_group" items reference an exercise group.

All endpoints are scoped to the authenticated user — there is no public visibility for workouts.

### Workouts

[ListWorkouts](<#ListWorkouts>) returns only workouts owned by the current user. [CreateWorkout](<#CreateWorkout>) creates a new empty workout — add sections and items via the section and section\-item endpoints below. [GetWorkout](<#GetWorkout>) returns the full workout tree \(sections and their items\). [UpdateWorkout](<#UpdateWorkout>) and [DeleteWorkout](<#DeleteWorkout>) require ownership.

### Sections

A section belongs to a workout and groups items \(e.g. "Warm\-up", "Main Sets", "Superset A"\). Sections are ordered by position. [CreateWorkoutSection](<#CreateWorkoutSection>) requires a valid workoutId owned by the current user. [ListWorkoutSections](<#ListWorkoutSections>) can be filtered by workoutId.

### Section Items

A section item links either an exercise scheme or an exercise group to a section. For "exercise" type items, the scheme defines which exercise to perform and how \(sets, reps, rest\). For "exercise\_group" type items, the user selects a specific exercise when starting the workout. [CreateWorkoutSectionItem](<#CreateWorkoutSectionItem>) requires a valid workoutSectionId whose parent workout is owned by the current user, plus a valid exerciseSchemeId or exerciseGroupId depending on the item type.

### Permissions

Workouts do not have a dedicated /permissions endpoint. Instead, all endpoints enforce ownership directly:

- List endpoints filter by the current user's ID
- All other endpoints check entity ownership and return 403 for non\-owners

<a name="CreateWorkout"></a>
### func [CreateWorkout](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L67>)

```go
func CreateWorkout(ctx context.Context, input *CreateWorkoutInput) (*CreateWorkoutOutput, error)
```

CreateWorkout creates an empty workout. Add sections via [CreateWorkoutSection](<#CreateWorkoutSection>) and items via [CreateWorkoutSectionItem](<#CreateWorkoutSectionItem>). POST /api/user/workouts

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/CreateWorkout)

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

CreateWorkout creates an empty workout. The owner is set from the authenticated user. Add sections via [CreateWorkoutSection](<#CreateWorkoutSection>).

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

w := doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{
	"name": "Push Day",
	"notes": "Chest, shoulders, triceps"
}`)

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
fmt.Println(workout.Owner)
fmt.Println(*workout.Notes)
// Output:
// 201
// Push Day
// alice
// Chest, shoulders, triceps
```

#### Output

```
201
Push Day
alice
Chest, shoulders, triceps
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="CreateWorkoutSectionItem"></a>
### func [CreateWorkoutSectionItem](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_item_handlers.go#L72>)

```go
func CreateWorkoutSectionItem(ctx context.Context, input *CreateWorkoutSectionItemInput) (*CreateWorkoutSectionItemOutput, error)
```

CreateWorkoutSectionItem adds an item to a section. The item type determines which reference field is required:

- "exercise": exerciseSchemeId is required
- "exercise\_group": exerciseGroupId is required

POST /api/user/workout\-section\-items

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/CreateWorkoutSectionItem)

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

Creating a section item requires a workout, a section, and an exercise scheme. The full hierarchy: Workout → Section → SectionItem → ExerciseScheme.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Create the exercise and scheme first.
createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)

// Create a workout and section.
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

// Add the exercise scheme to the section.
w := doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-items", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1,
	"type": "exercise",
	"exerciseSchemeId": 1,
	"position": 0
}`)

var item models.WorkoutSectionItem
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &item)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(item.WorkoutSectionID)
fmt.Println(item.Type)
fmt.Println(*item.ExerciseSchemeID)
// Output:
// 201
// 1
// exercise
// 1
```

#### Output

```
201
1
exercise
1
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot add items to another user's section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-items", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1,
	"type": "exercise",
	"exerciseSchemeId": 1,
	"position": 0
}`, "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="CreateWorkoutSectionOutput"></a>
## type [CreateWorkoutSectionOutput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L82-L84>)



```go
type CreateWorkoutSectionOutput struct {
    Body models.WorkoutSection

```

<a name="CreateWorkoutSection"></a>
### func [CreateWorkoutSection](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_handlers.go#L78>)

```go
func CreateWorkoutSection(ctx context.Context, input *CreateWorkoutSectionInput) (*CreateWorkoutSectionOutput, error)
```

CreateWorkoutSection adds a section to a workout. Requires a workoutId referencing a workout owned by the current user. A workout must exist before sections can be added — see [CreateWorkout](<#CreateWorkout>). POST /api/user/workout\-sections

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/CreateWorkoutSection)

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

Creating a section requires a workout. The workout must be created first via [CreateWorkout](<#CreateWorkout>).

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Create a workout first.
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

// Add a section to it.
w := doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1,
	"type": "main",
	"label": "Compound Lifts",
	"position": 0,
	"restBetweenExercises": 120
}`)

var section models.WorkoutSection
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &section)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(section.Type)
fmt.Println(*section.Label)
fmt.Println(section.WorkoutID)
// Output:
// 201
// main
// Compound Lifts
// 1
```

#### Output

```
201
main
Compound Lifts
1
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot add a section to another user's workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1,
	"type": "main",
	"position": 0
}`, "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="DeleteWorkout"></a>
### func [DeleteWorkout](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L143>)

```go
func DeleteWorkout(ctx context.Context, input *DeleteWorkoutInput) (*DeleteWorkoutOutput, error)
```

DeleteWorkout deletes a workout. DELETE /api/user/workouts/\{id\}

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/DeleteWorkout)

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot delete another user's workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workouts/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can delete their workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doJSON(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workouts/1", nil)
fmt.Println(w.Code)

// Workout is gone.
wg := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", nil)
fmt.Println(wg.Code)
// Output:
// 204
// 404
```

#### Output

```
204
404
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="DeleteWorkoutSectionItem"></a>
### func [DeleteWorkoutSectionItem](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_item_handlers.go#L118>)

```go
func DeleteWorkoutSectionItem(ctx context.Context, input *DeleteWorkoutSectionItemInput) (*DeleteWorkoutSectionItemOutput, error)
```

DeleteWorkoutSectionItem removes an item from a section. DELETE /api/user/workout\-section\-items/\{id\}

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/DeleteWorkoutSectionItem)

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot delete items from another user's section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-items", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "type": "exercise", "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workout-section-items/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can delete an item from their section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-items", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "type": "exercise", "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

w := doJSON(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workout-section-items/1", nil)
fmt.Println(w.Code)

// Section item is gone.
wl := doRaw(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-section-items?workoutSectionId=1", "")
var items []models.WorkoutSectionItem
json.Unmarshal(wl.Body.Bytes(), &items)
fmt.Println(len(items))
// Output:
// 204
// 0
```

#### Output

```
204
0
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="DeleteWorkoutSection"></a>
### func [DeleteWorkoutSection](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_handlers.go#L115>)

```go
func DeleteWorkoutSection(ctx context.Context, input *DeleteWorkoutSectionInput) (*DeleteWorkoutSectionOutput, error)
```

DeleteWorkoutSection removes a section from its workout. DELETE /api/user/workout\-sections/\{id\}

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/DeleteWorkoutSection)

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot delete another user's section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can delete a section from their workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doJSON(r, "DELETE", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", nil)
fmt.Println(w.Code)

wg := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", nil)
fmt.Println(wg.Code)
// Output:

// 404
```

```
204
404
```

<a name="GetWorkoutOutput"></a>

<a name="GetWorkout"></a>
### func [GetWorkout](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L83>)

```go
func GetWorkout(ctx context.Context, input *GetWorkoutInput) (*GetWorkoutOutput, error)
```

GetWorkout returns a workout with its full section and exercise tree. Returns 403 if the caller is not the owner. GET /api/user/workouts/\{id\}

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/GetWorkout)

<details><summary>Example (Full Hierarchy)</summary>
<p>

Full hierarchy: create a workout with sections and items, then retrieve the complete tree via GetWorkout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Create exercise and scheme.
createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)

// Build the workout hierarchy.
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "label": "Compound", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-items", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "type": "exercise", "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

// GetWorkout returns the full tree.
w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", nil)

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
fmt.Println(len(workout.Sections), "section(s)")
fmt.Println(*workout.Sections[0].Label)
fmt.Println(len(workout.Sections[0].Items), "item(s)")
fmt.Println(*workout.Sections[0].Items[0].ExerciseSchemeID)
// Output:
// 200
// Push Day
// 1 section(s)
// Compound
// 1 item(s)
// 1
```

#### Output

```
200
Push Day
1 section(s)
Compound
1 item(s)
1
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Group Member Sees Workout Group Info)</summary>
<p>

GetWorkout for a group member includes workoutGroup info.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Bob interacts with the API to establish his profile
doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

// Alice creates a workout, group, and invites bob
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-groups", `{
	"name": "Gym Buddies", "workoutId": 1
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-group-memberships", `{
	"groupId": 1, "userId": "bob", "role": "member"
}`)

// Bob fetches the workout directly
w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", "", "bob")

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
fmt.Println(workout.WorkoutGroup.GroupName)
fmt.Println(workout.WorkoutGroup.Membership)
// Output:
// 200
// Push Day
// Gym Buddies
// invited
```

#### Output

```
200
Push Day
Gym Buddies
invited
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner is denied access to another user's workout with 403 Forbidden.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner Access)</summary>
<p>

Owner can retrieve their own workout with full section and exercise tree.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1", nil)

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
fmt.Println(workout.Owner)
// Output:
// 200
// Push Day
// alice
```

#### Output

```
200
Push Day
alice
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="GetWorkoutPermissionsInput"></a>
## type [GetWorkoutPermissionsInput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L52-L54>)



```go
type GetWorkoutPermissionsInput struct {
    ID uint `path:"id"`
}
```

<a name="GetWorkoutPermissionsOutput"></a>
## type [GetWorkoutPermissionsOutput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L56-L58>)



```go
type GetWorkoutPermissionsOutput struct {
    Body shared.PermissionsResponse
}
```

<a name="GetWorkoutPermissions"></a>
### func [GetWorkoutPermissions](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L162>)

```go
func GetWorkoutPermissions(ctx context.Context, input *GetWorkoutPermissionsInput) (*GetWorkoutPermissionsOutput, error)
```

GetWorkoutPermissions returns the permissions the current user has on a workout. GET /api/user/workouts/\{id\}/permissions

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/GetWorkoutPermissions)

<details><summary>Example (Group Admin)</summary>
<p>

A group admin gets READ and MODIFY.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-groups", `{
	"name": "Gym Buddies", "workoutId": 1
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-group-memberships", `{
	"groupId": 1, "userId": "bob", "role": "member"
}`)
// Promote bob to admin
doRaw(r, "PUT", "/api/user/workout-group-memberships/1", `{"role": "admin"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1/permissions", "", "bob")

var resp shared.PermissionsResponse
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(resp.Permissions)
// Output:
// 200
// [READ MODIFY]
```

#### Output

```
200
[READ MODIFY]
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Group Member)</summary>
<p>

A group member with "member" role gets READ only.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-groups", `{
	"name": "Gym Buddies", "workoutId": 1
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-group-memberships", `{
	"groupId": 1, "userId": "bob", "role": "member"
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1/permissions", "", "bob")

var resp shared.PermissionsResponse
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(resp.Permissions)
// Output:
// 200
// [READ]
```

#### Output

```
200
[READ]
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Invited Member)</summary>
<p>

An invited member gets READ only.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-groups", `{
	"name": "Gym Buddies", "workoutId": 1
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-group-memberships", `{
	"groupId": 1, "userId": "bob", "role": "invited"
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1/permissions", "", "bob")

var resp shared.PermissionsResponse
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(resp.Permissions)
// Output:
// 200
// [READ]
```

#### Output

```
200
[READ]
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (No Access)</summary>
<p>

A user with no access gets 404.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1/permissions", "", "bob")

fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output:
// 404
```

#### Output

```
404
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner gets full permissions: READ, MODIFY, DELETE.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRaw(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts/1/permissions", "")

var resp shared.PermissionsResponse
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(resp.Permissions)
// Output:
// 200
// [READ MODIFY DELETE]
```

#### Output

```
200
[READ MODIFY DELETE]
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="GetWorkoutSectionInput"></a>
## type [GetWorkoutSectionInput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L86-L88>)



```go
type GetWorkoutSectionInput struct {
    ID uint `path:"id"`
}
```

<a name="GetWorkoutSectionOutput"></a>
## type [GetWorkoutSectionOutput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L90-L92>)



```go
type GetWorkoutSectionOutput struct {
    Body models.WorkoutSection
}
```

<a name="GetWorkoutSection"></a>
### func [GetWorkoutSection](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_handlers.go#L100>)

```go
func GetWorkoutSection(ctx context.Context, input *GetWorkoutSectionInput) (*GetWorkoutSectionOutput, error)
```

GetWorkoutSection returns a single section with its exercises. GET /api/user/workout\-sections/\{id\}

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/GetWorkoutSection)

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot access another user's section.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", "", "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can retrieve a single section with its exercises.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "label": "Compound", "position": 0
}`)

w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections/1", nil)

var section models.WorkoutSection
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &section)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(section.Type)
// Output:
// 200
// main
```

#### Output

```
200
main
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="ListWorkoutSectionItemsInput"></a>
## type [ListWorkoutSectionItemsInput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L102-L104>)



```go
type ListWorkoutSectionItemsInput struct {
    WorkoutSectionID string `query:"workoutSectionId" doc:"Filter by workout section ID"`
}
```

<a name="ListWorkoutSectionItemsOutput"></a>
## type [ListWorkoutSectionItemsOutput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L106-L108>)



```go
type ListWorkoutSectionItemsOutput struct {
    Body []models.WorkoutSectionItem
}
```

<a name="ListWorkoutSectionItems"></a>
### func [ListWorkoutSectionItems](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_item_handlers.go#L38>)

```go
func ListWorkoutSectionItems(ctx context.Context, input *ListWorkoutSectionItemsInput) (*ListWorkoutSectionItemsOutput, error)
```

ListWorkoutSectionItems returns section items owned by the current user. Filter by workoutSectionId query param. GET /api/user/workout\-section\-items

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/ListWorkoutSectionItems)

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner sees an empty list for another user's section items.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-items", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "type": "exercise", "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-section-items?workoutSectionId=1", "", "bob")

var items []models.WorkoutSectionItem
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &items)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(items))
// Output:
// 200
// 0
```

#### Output

```
200
0
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

ListWorkoutSectionItems returns items in sections owned by the current user. Filter by workoutSectionId.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

createExerciseSchemeForExample(r)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-section-items", `{
	"workoutSectionId": 1, "type": "exercise", "exerciseSchemeId": 1, "position": 0
}`)

w := doRaw(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-section-items?workoutSectionId=1", "")

var items []models.WorkoutSectionItem
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &items)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(items))
fmt.Println(*items[0].ExerciseSchemeID)
// Output:
// 200
// 1
// 1
```

#### Output

```
200
1
1
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="ListWorkoutSectionsInput"></a>
## type [ListWorkoutSectionsInput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L62-L64>)



```go
type ListWorkoutSectionsInput struct {
    WorkoutID string `query:"workoutId" doc:"Filter by workout ID"`
}
```

<a name="ListWorkoutSectionsOutput"></a>
## type [ListWorkoutSectionsOutput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L66-L68>)



```go
type ListWorkoutSectionsOutput struct {
    Body []models.WorkoutSection
}
```

<a name="ListWorkoutSections"></a>
### func [ListWorkoutSections](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/section_handlers.go#L47>)

```go
func ListWorkoutSections(ctx context.Context, input *ListWorkoutSectionsInput) (*ListWorkoutSectionsOutput, error)
```

ListWorkoutSections returns sections owned by the current user. Filter by workoutId query param to get sections for a specific workout. GET /api/user/workout\-sections

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/ListWorkoutSections)

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner sees an empty list for another user's sections.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "position": 0
}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections?workoutId=1", "", "bob")

var sections []models.WorkoutSection
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &sections)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(sections))
// Output:
// 200
// 0
```

#### Output

```
200
0
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

ListWorkoutSections returns sections owned by the current user. Filter by workoutId to get sections for a specific workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "main", "label": "Compound", "position": 0
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-sections", `{
	"workoutId": 1, "type": "supplementary", "label": "Isolation", "position": 1
}`)

w := doRaw(r, "GET", "/api/user/workout-sections?workoutId=1", "")

var sections []models.WorkoutSection
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &sections)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(sections))
fmt.Println(*sections[0].Label)
fmt.Println(*sections[1].Label)
// Output:
// 200
// 2
// Compound
// Isolation
```

#### Output

```
200
2
Compound
Isolation
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="ListWorkoutsInput"></a>
## type [ListWorkoutsInput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L10>)



```go
type ListWorkoutsInput struct{}
```

<a name="ListWorkoutsOutput"></a>
## type [ListWorkoutsOutput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L12-L14>)



```go
type ListWorkoutsOutput struct {
    Body []models.Workout
}
```

<a name="ListWorkouts"></a>
### func [ListWorkouts](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L28>)

```go
func ListWorkouts(ctx context.Context, input *ListWorkoutsInput) (*ListWorkoutsOutput, error)
```

ListWorkouts returns all workouts owned by the current user, each including its sections and section exercises. GET /api/user/workouts

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/ListWorkouts)

<details><summary>Example (Group Member Sees Workout Group Info)</summary>
<p>

When bob lists workouts, shared workouts include workoutGroup info with the group name and his membership role.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Bob interacts with the API to establish his profile
doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

// Alice creates a workout
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

// Alice creates a workout group and invites bob
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-groups", `{
	"name": "Gym Buddies", "workoutId": 1
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-group-memberships", `{
	"groupId": 1, "userId": "bob", "role": "member"
}`)

// Bob lists workouts — should see Alice's shared workout with group info
w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

var workouts []models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workouts)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(workouts))
fmt.Println(workouts[0].Name)
fmt.Println(workouts[0].WorkoutGroup.GroupName)
fmt.Println(workouts[0].WorkoutGroup.Membership)
// Output:
// 200
// 1
// Push Day
// Gym Buddies
// invited
```

#### Output

```
200
1
Push Day
Gym Buddies
invited
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner sees an empty list — workouts are always private.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

var workouts []models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workouts)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(workouts))
// Output:
// 200
// 0
```

#### Output

```
200
0
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

ListWorkouts returns only the current user's workouts.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Pull Day"}`)

w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", nil)

var workouts []models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workouts)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(workouts))
fmt.Println(workouts[0].Name)
fmt.Println(workouts[1].Name)
// Output:
// 200
// 2
// Push Day
// Pull Day
```

#### Output

```
200
2
Push Day
Pull Day
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner Does Not See Workout Group Info)</summary>
<p>

The owner's own workouts do not include workoutGroup info, even if a group exists for that workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Alice creates a workout and a group for it
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-groups", `{
	"name": "Gym Buddies", "workoutId": 1
}`)

// Alice lists her workouts — workoutGroup should be absent
w := doJSON(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", nil)

var workouts []models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workouts)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(len(workouts))
fmt.Println(workouts[0].Name)
fmt.Println(workouts[0].WorkoutGroup == nil)
// Output:
// 200
// 1
// Push Day
// true
```

#### Output

```
200
1
Push Day
true
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="UpdateWorkoutInput"></a>
## type [UpdateWorkoutInput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L37-L40>)



```go
type UpdateWorkoutInput struct {
    ID   uint `path:"id"`
    Body WorkoutBody
}
```

<a name="UpdateWorkoutOutput"></a>
## type [UpdateWorkoutOutput](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L42-L44>)



```go
type UpdateWorkoutOutput struct {
    Body models.Workout
}
```

<a name="UpdateWorkout"></a>
### func [UpdateWorkout](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/workout_handlers.go#L106>)

```go
func UpdateWorkout(ctx context.Context, input *UpdateWorkoutInput) (*UpdateWorkoutOutput, error)
```

UpdateWorkout updates workout metadata \(name, notes\). Sections and exercises are managed via their own endpoints. PUT /api/user/workouts/\{id\}

[OpenAPI docs](/api/docs#/operations/UpdateWorkout)

<details><summary>Example (Group Admin Sees Workout Group Info)</summary>
<p>

UpdateWorkout response for an admin group member includes workoutGroup info.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

// Bob interacts with the API to establish his profile
doRawAs(r, "GET", "/api/user/workouts", "", "bob")

// Alice creates a workout, group, and adds bob as admin
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-groups", `{
	"name": "Gym Buddies", "workoutId": 1
}`)
doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workout-group-memberships", `{
	"groupId": 1, "userId": "bob", "role": "member"
}`)
// Promote bob to admin so he can modify
doRaw(r, "PUT", "/api/user/workout-group-memberships/1", `{"role": "admin"}`)

// Bob updates the workout — response should include workoutGroup
w := doRawAs(r, "PUT", "/api/user/workouts/1", `{"name": "Upper Push"}`, "bob")

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
fmt.Println(workout.WorkoutGroup.GroupName)
fmt.Println(workout.WorkoutGroup.Membership)
// Output:
// 200
// Upper Push
// Gym Buddies
// admin
```

#### Output

```
200
Upper Push
Gym Buddies
admin
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Non Owner Denied)</summary>
<p>

Non\-owner cannot update another user's workout.

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRawAs(r, "PUT", "/api/user/workouts/1", `{"name": "Stolen"}`, "bob")
fmt.Println(w.Code)
// Output: 403
```

#### Output

```
403
```

</p>
</details>

<details><summary>Example (Owner)</summary>
<p>

Owner can update workout metadata \(name, notes\).

```go
setupExampleDB()
r := newRouter()

doRaw(r, "POST", "/api/user/workouts", `{"name": "Push Day"}`)

w := doRaw(r, "PUT", "/api/user/workouts/1", `{
	"name": "Upper Body Push",
	"notes": "Updated focus"
}`)

var workout models.Workout
json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &workout)
fmt.Println(w.Code)
fmt.Println(workout.Name)
// Output:
// 200
// Upper Body Push
```

#### Output

```
200
Upper Body Push
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="WorkoutBody"></a>
## type [WorkoutBody](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L16-L19>)



```go
type WorkoutBody struct {
    Name  string  `json:"name" required:"true"`
    Notes *string `json:"notes,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="WorkoutSectionBody"></a>
## type [WorkoutSectionBody](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L70-L76>)



```go
type WorkoutSectionBody struct {
    WorkoutID            uint                      `json:"workoutId" required:"true"`
    Type                 models.WorkoutSectionType `json:"type" required:"true"`
    Label                *string                   `json:"label,omitempty"`
    Position             int                       `json:"position"`
    RestBetweenExercises *int                      `json:"restBetweenExercises,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="WorkoutSectionItemBody"></a>
## type [WorkoutSectionItemBody](<https://github.com/wohlben/GesiTr/blob/main/internal/user/workout/handlers/huma_types.go#L110-L117>)



```go
type WorkoutSectionItemBody struct {
    WorkoutSectionID uint                          `json:"workoutSectionId" required:"true"`
    Type             models.WorkoutSectionItemType `json:"type" required:"true"`
    ExerciseSchemeID *uint                         `json:"exerciseSchemeId,omitempty"`
    ExerciseGroupID  *uint                         `json:"exerciseGroupId,omitempty"`
    Data             *string                       `json:"data,omitempty"`
    Position         int                           `json:"position"`
}
```

Generated by [gomarkdoc](<https://github.com/princjef/gomarkdoc>)
